extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked with 3km remaining on Luz Ardiden, distanced VINGEGAARD and CARAPAZ by 2 seconds for his third stage win and unassailable GC lead.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR delayed final attack until final 3km despite MAJKA pacing, suggesting deliberate energy conservation for stage hunting over gap-building.
INEOS leadership confusion revealed: GANNA and POELS both working on final climb despite having no GC card to play.
CARAPAZ held third GC despite VINGEGAARD gaining 6 seconds through intermediate bonuses, indicating bonus seconds decided final podium placement.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: secured unassailable 5:45 GC lead with 3 stages remaining, treating final mountain stage as sprint opportunity rather than time trial
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: only rider to follow POGAČAR's acceleration in final 3km, moved 6 seconds clear of CARAPAZ for second overall
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: matched VINGEGAARD's acceleration but lost podium buffer through bonus seconds, not absolute climbing deficit
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: moved into top-5 GC on final mountain stage while maintaining freshness for stage hunting on Stage 19
rider_signals.GAUDU David: negative: opened minute gap on descent after LATOUR collaboration but cracked when INEOS controlled final climb tempo
rider_signals.POELS Wout: neutral: working for INEOS on final climb despite no team GC interest suggests team riding for KOM jersey defense
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: paced VINGEGAARD in final kilometers but exhausted before decisive move, limiting Jumbo's tactical options
